file.description: A character value specifying the path to the

chrom.description: Chromosome of data, as a string

altchrom.description: Alternate chromosome for interchromosomal data, as a string

altchromstart.description: Alternate chromosome integer start position for interchromosomal data

altchromend.description: Alternate chromosome integer end position for interchromosomal data

assembly.description: Default genome assembly as a string or a plotgardener assembly object

resolution.description: A numeric specifying the width of each pixel

res_scale.description: A character value specifying the resolution scale

zrange.description: A numeric vector of length 2 specifying the range of interaction scores, where extreme values will be set to the max or min

norm.description: Character value specifying hic data normalization method

matrix.description: Character value indicating the type of matrix to output

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters

quiet.description: A logical indicating whether or not to print messages
